title: A to Z Childrens Kids Metal Junior Tennis Set 2 Racket Raquets and 1 Ball Outdoor Toy Play Game Set
features: Tennis is a great way for children to develop their hand-eye co-ordination and improve all-round fitness.
This beginner's tennis set is made of sturdy metal frame and includes two tennis rackets and one ball.
Size of the tennis racket 23 cm width x 53 cm length, great for beginners.
With carry bag. Recommended age 6 years +
Colours may vary from those illustrated.

Special Design With the introduction of a one-piece moulded technology, the tennis racquet has the feature of high intensity and durability. Not only does it combine a good hit acceleration, but it also provides sufficient stroke control. It features an open string pattern to enhance power and spin LENGTH: Size of the tennis racket 23 cm width x 53 cm length, great for beginners. WEIGHT: lightweight and easy to hold and swing, bring you a convenient sports experience Suitable For Perfect for beginner or recreational teenager/adult players. A wide range of powerful and attractive colours ensures the needs of every man and woman. This beginner's tennis set is made of a sturdy metal frame and includes two tennis rackets and one ball. The package includes 2x tennis rackets and one ball. Colours may vary from those illustrated.
